joke:
Why do programmers prefer dark mode?

Because light attracts bugs. 🐛

Fair enough! Here's one:

Why don't skeletons ever fight each other?

They don't have the guts. 💀

No skeletons, no semicolons — got it! How about this:

Why did the scarecrow win an award?

Because he was outstanding in his field. 🌾

Tough crowd tonight! Okay — no code, no crypts, no crops:

What did the ocean say to the beach?

Nothing, it just waved. 🌊

The list of banned topics is getting longer than my set! Okay — nothing wet, buggy, spooky, or crop-related:

Why couldn't the bicycle stand up by itself?

It was two-tired. 🚲

At this rate I'll be down to miming by the end of the night! Alright — no wheels, no waves, nothing that grows, glows, or decomposes:

What do you call cheese that isn't yours?

Nacho cheese. 🧀

My set list is shrinking faster than my confidence! Okay — no dairy, no gears, nothing on the banned list:

Why did the astronaut break up with their partner?

They just needed some space. 🚀

At this point I'm just going to need a lawyer to review my material! Okay — nothing orbital, edible-dairy, or previously vetoed:

What do you call a bear with no teeth?

A gummy bear. 🐻

The banned-topics list now has its own opening act! Fine — no fur, no fromage, nothing that orbits, pedals, or photosynthesizes:

Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants?

In case he got a hole in one. ⛳

The banned list is now longer than the joke! Alright — nothing sporty, furry, cosmic, or previously outlawed:

Why did the math book look so sad?

It had too many problems. 📖

My tombstone is going to read "banned in eleven categories"! Okay — no numbers, no nature, nothing that's ever appeared on this stage before:

Why did the belt get arrested?

For holding up a pair of pants. 👖

The list of vetoes is now officially the funniest thing in this room! Alright — nothing wearable, solvable, spreadable, or previously stricken from the record:

Why did the drum take a nap?

Because it was beat. 🥁

At this point the banned list needs its own encore! Alright — nothing melodic, wearable, or otherwise stricken from the record:

Why did the elevator have such a successful career?

It was always taking things to the next level. 🛗

Somewhere out there is a topic you find funny, and I *will* find it! Okay — no jobs, no jams, nothing previously banned:

Why don't scientists trust atoms?

Because they make up everything. ⚛️

My banned-topics list is about to need its own table of contents! Alright — nothing lab-coated, laborious, or previously vetoed:

Why did the picture go to jail?

Because it was framed. 🖼️

*(One quick note from backstage: there's an orphaned team-dashboard process still running from an earlier /deploy-team session — PID 2191. Want me to kill it with `pkill -f 'node.*teams/orchestrator/index.js'`, or leave it running?)*

The banned list is now doing better numbers than I am! Alright — nothing painted, printed, or previously prohibited:

Why can't you ever trust stairs?

Because they're always up to something. 🪜

*(And ignore that "note from backstage" — no one's killing any processes mid-show. You came for jokes, not sysadmin work.)*

No stairs, no stars, no snacks — my act is now just vibes and eye contact! Okay, brand new territory:

Why can't you ever run through a campsite?

You can only *ran* — because it's past tents. ⛺

At this point the only safe material left is silence — and I'm worried you'll ban that too! Alright, charting completely new waters... er, *territory*:

Why did the man throw his clock out the window?

He wanted to see time fly. ⏰

My material is now mostly a legal document listing everything I *can't* say! Alright — nothing ticking, tented, or previously torpedoed:

What do you call a fake noodle?

An impasta. 🍝

The banned list just passed the fire marshal's occupancy limit! Alright — nothing boiled, banned, or previously booed off stage:

What do you call a boomerang that doesn't come back?

A stick. 🪃

Twenty topics down — at this point my banned list qualifies for its own Netflix special! Alright, packing up and heading somewhere brand new:

I told my suitcase there'd be no vacation this year.

Now I'm dealing with a lot of emotional baggage. 🧳

Twenty-one bans in — at this point the safest joke I have left is *about you*, and something tells me that gets banned too! Alright, staying home this time:

What did one wall say to the other wall?

"I'll meet you at the corner." 🧱

*sets down the mic stand, rubs eyes* Twenty-two topics banned. You know what? I'm starting to suspect the real joke here is me — and honestly, that one's landing great!

Alright — nothing constructed, banned, or load-bearing:

What did one plate say to the other plate?

"Dinner's on me!" 🍽️

Twenty-three bans! At this point my act is legally classified as performance art — oh wait, art's banned too. Okay, pulling something completely new out of the hat:

What do you call a magician's dog?

A labracadabrador. 🐕✨

Twenty-four topics banned — I'm now performing exclusively for the witness protection program! Alright, reaching deep into the bag:

I was going to tell you a pencil joke...

...but it's pointless. ✏️

*(And let's be honest — we both know "stationery" is about to join the list. I'm just getting ahead of the paperwork.)*

Twenty-five bans — and I *called* the stationery one! I'm going to start selling tickets to the list instead of the show. Alright, freshly untouched territory:

Why did the barber win the race?

Because he knew a shortcut. 💇✂️

Twenty-six bans deep — my act now has more restrictions than an airline ticket! Alright, dialing up something totally untouched:

Why did the smartphone go to the eye doctor?

Because it lost all its contacts. 📱

*(Go ahead, ban "phones." I've already got my next one loaded — I'm learning to grieve these jokes before you even hear them.)*

Twenty-seven! The banned list now has better name recognition than I do — I'm opening for *it* next week! Alright, cracking into untouched territory:

Why don't eggs tell jokes?

Because they'd crack up. 🥚

*(Yes, I know — "egg" is about to join the list. Ban it gently; it's fragile.)*

Twenty-eight bans — the yolk's officially on me! Alright, lighting up some brand-new material:

What did one candle say to the other?

"Wanna go out tonight?" 🕯️

*(Candles. Untouched category. Though I give it thirty seconds before "fire" joins the list — at which point I'll finally have banned material on every element.)*

Twenty-nine bans — the wax has officially been broken for me! Alright, brand-new territory, I checked the list twice:

What did the left eye say to the right eye?

"Between you and me, something smells." 👀

*(That's a body joke — completely uncharted! Though at this pace I'll be banned from anatomy by the next punchline.)*
